reviews.review_description: This game was pretty interesting it was fun but if I were to flip over I almost threw up. Definitely gonna prank my friends with this

I see that this game could have great potential in the future, but for now I would have rated it even lower if I could have. I own over 550 games/apps and this one is almost impossible to play. You have NO real control over the snowmobiles. One spit second of gas and the thing is on its side or running off the race area. Holding your arms out to cling to the handlebars for longer than a few seconds gets very tiring and the slightest movement of either hand causes the snowmobiles to go out of control.  It's either stop or go too fast and crash, there is no in-between.  I found it's also extremely easy to beat the A.I. characters if you just slowly move a few feet at a time, stop and repeat. Eventually I quickly earned enough money to go directly from the free snowmobile to the most expensive along with most costly rider and location upgrades.  This game is so frustrating that I woke my wife up with all my swearing. 

Have the creator (s) ever ridden on a real snowmobile?
interesting and physics-based realistic movement on a snowmobile
Realy like to see beautiful environment in vr, nice physics and graphics. Maybe need more snowmobiles. Ver good job devs!
I love this guys environment. Really gets me into the game!! Bravo guys 👍
Great exprerience, nice graphic and gameplay
